content.text: The city library will host a book fair this Saturday. Visitors can meet local authors and attend writing workshops throughout the day. Special discounts will be available on selected books. Families are encouraged to participate in the children's reading activities. Admission to the event is free.
Describe everything you see in the picture. Include details about the environment and the people.
What do you usually do in your free time?
How long have you had your favorite hobby?
Why would you recommend your hobby to other people?
Should governments impose stricter regulations to reduce environmental pollution? Explain your opinion.
Write one sentence based on the picture using the words 'customer' and 'basket'.

You work in the Human Resources department. Read the email below and respond.

Dear HR Team,

I registered for the leadership training program scheduled for next week. However, I have not received any information regarding the schedule, location, or required materials. Could you please provide these details?

Best regards,
Emily Carter

In your response, answer the questions and provide additional helpful information.
Do the benefits of artificial intelligence outweigh its disadvantages in the workplace? Write an essay of at least 300 words supporting your opinion with reasons and examples.

You are an event coordinator. Read the email below and respond.

Dear Organizer,

I registered for your business conference last month but have not yet received a confirmation email. I would like to verify that my registration was successful and learn more about the event schedule.

Thank you,
John Davis

In your response, confirm the registration status, provide event details, and offer assistance if needed.
